Uh oh.  Crap.  These images are shared with the v4.8 branch which I just clobbered the other day.  Let me see if I can recover them :grimacing:
Okay :sweat_smile: I was able to recover all `c20231116t174419z` images.  Thank $DIETY for "recycle bins".  Thanks @lsm5 for pinging me on this.
